mapper.select: select id, owner_id, owner_name, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visitor_id_card, visit_reason, expected_visit_time, actual_visit_time, leave_time, case status when '0' then '待签入' when '1' then '已签入' when '2' then '已离开' when '3' then '已取消' end as status, invite_code, community_id, building, unit, room, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_visitor where id = #{id}

select id, owner_id, owner_name, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visitor_id_card, visit_reason, expected_visit_time, actual_visit_time, leave_time, case status when '0' then '待签入' when '1' then '已签入' when '2' then '已离开' when '3' then '已取消' end as status, invite_code, community_id, building, unit, room, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_visitor order by create_time desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update community_visitor set status = '1', actual_visit_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = '0'
